_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulation of ERK signaling modulates GABA release and learning.

_contextSnippet: In contrast, Nf1 and the syn I+/− Nf1 mice did not spend more time in the training quadrant than in other quadrants
details: Showed spatial learning deficits in Morris water maze probe trial - did not spend more time in training quadrant than other quadrants
